summary: Accepted after re-review. DELETE now preserves historical data by deactivating RadarTask records, and branch/worktree metadata now correctly says main.

tests_run.command: rg hard-delete/delete patterns in reviewed scope
tests_run.result: No remaining db.radarTask.delete/deleteMany usage found in reviewed app/lib/task/handoff scope.

tests_run.command: npx prisma validate / npx prisma generate / npm run build
tests_run.result: Lead-reported rerun passed; build had the same non-fatal Windows SWC warning.

decisions: Accepted non-destructive DELETE semantics because the helper now uses Prisma update with isActive=false.
Accepted branch/worktree metadata correction to main.
Left the helper name deleteRadarTask as a non-blocking continuity choice because README and response payload clearly state deactivation semantics.
risks: Repeated DELETE calls may refresh updatedAt because they repeat the deactivation update.
Workspace contains unrelated dirty/untracked JustGoal and agent files; treated as outside this focused read-only re-review.
